cohort_breakdown: 6 categories x {ZS, N=2, N=10, N=30}; 1 seed at ZS, 3 seeds at trained N. 54 trained cells + 6 ZS cells.
verdict_summary: Stage2 verdict (cumulative cohort 140 rows): 87 keep, 36 noop, 14 new_baseline, 3 discard. Stage2 alone: 33 keep, 21 noop, 6 new_baseline, 0 discard. The 3 discard cells remain mvtec/transistor N=30 from stage1 — no new discards in stage2.
held_out_prediction_result: RULE PARTLY PASSES per locked-in criteria (2 of 3 predictions met). Detailed result: (1) Per-cat ZS-band predictions FAILED on visa/macaroni2 (ZS=0.495 just below 0.55 threshold, lift=+0.088 just below +0.10 threshold; 4 of 5 constrained cats passed). (2) Spearman rank correlation between ZS-AUROC and BEST_LIFT across all 14 cats: rho=-0.758, p=0.00084 — well below the locked-in rho<=-0.6 with p<0.05 threshold; PASSED with strong margin. (3) N=2 captures >=80% of best lift on 4 of 6 stage2 cats — exactly meeting the >=4 threshold; PASSED.
diagnosis: The qualitative rule (lift inversely correlates with zero-shot AUROC) is strongly confirmed on held-out data — Spearman rho=-0.758 with p<0.001 is the cleanest summary statistic. The quantitative thresholds in prediction (1) were too sharp: visa/macaroni2 missed by 0.012 AUROC on a 0.10 threshold. The data supports a softer formulation: lift magnitude correlates monotonically with (1 - ZS_AUROC) but with substantial heteroscedastic noise — chewinggum hit the AUROC ceiling at +0.550 lift, while macaroni2 with similar low ZS gained only +0.088. The N=2 knee shape replicates (4 of 6 stage2 cats vs 5 of 8 stage1 cats; 9 of 14 overall). One unexpected stage2 finding: visa/capsules at ZS=0.633 sat in the mid-band with lift only +0.022, suggesting the rule may be tighter than 'inverse correlation' — cats with ZS in [0.55, 0.70] may also be low-lift, hinting at a piecewise threshold not captured by pure linear correlation.
recommendation: next_config: run stage3 with a second locked-in held-out prediction set covering 10 more cats (mvtec/carpet, grid, leather, pill, zipper; visa/pcb1, pcb2, pcb3, pcb4, pipe_fryum). Stage3 was already pre-registered in queue.json as 'queued_after_stage2' with the note 'Run regardless of stage2 outcome.' This is the second held-out set that converts a partly-passing rule on n=14 cats into a more defensible result on n=24 cats. Two specific predictions to lock in for stage3: (a) Spearman rho across 24 cats remains <=-0.6 with p<0.01; (b) N=2 knee shape (>=80% of best lift) holds on >=6 of the 10 stage3 cats.
rationale: The Spearman result alone (rho=-0.76, p=0.00084 on n=14 held-out + original cats) is robust enough that one borderline ZS-band miss does not invalidate the qualitative rule. Stage3 expands n to 24 and provides a second held-out test of the same rule. The N=2 knee replication on stage2 (4 of 6) closely matches stage1 (5 of 8), suggesting the knee shape is a stable property of the recipe. The discovered mid-band issue (visa/capsules ZS=0.633 with low lift) is a refinement opportunity for stage3 — predicting 'mid-band cats also low-lift' would convert the simple monotone rule into a piecewise rule that better fits the observed data, but introducing that refinement before stage3 would constitute post-hoc tuning. Better to run stage3 on the original locked-in rule and report the residual variance honestly.
anti_goodhart_check: All 36 noop cells fall on N=30 cells where the model has saturated; no noop cells at N=2 or N=10 except for cats with already-strong ZS (transistor, capsules). All 3 discard cells are stage1 transistor N=30 — no new discards in stage2, and the stage2 cat with strong ZS (mvtec/wood at 0.985) achieved noop or marginal-keep without regression. The locked-in pass criterion was strict (3 of 3 must pass) and was honestly missed; reporting 'partly passes' rather than retroactively softening either the threshold or the criteria is consistent with the no-goalpost-moving clause committed before stage2 ran.
next_action_sequence: Update queue.json with stage3 locked-in predictions BEFORE stage3 runs; commit.
Run stage3 driver + ZS follow-up (~3-4h trained + 0.5h ZS = ~4.5h wall, 10 cats).
Test stage3 predictions; report final outcome (rule passes / partly-passes / fails on combined held-out test of 16 cats outside stage1).
